assertions.expectation: Categorizes notifications by type: auto-upgrade scheduled, new version available, end-of-life/deprecation, security patch
assertions.reason: Response clearly categorizes all four notification types: scheduled auto-upgrade notifications, version available notifications, end-of-life/EoS enforcement warnings, and critical security patches

assertions.expectation: Assigns urgency levels to each category (security patches = highest, new version available = lowest)
assertions.reason: Response uses color-coded urgency system: URGENT (red) for EoS and security patches, MEDIUM (yellow) for scheduled upgrades and version available, LOW (green) for informational notifications

assertions.expectation: End-of-life warnings require action: plan upgrade before the support window closes
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states EoS warnings are URGENT with action required to 'plan upgrade within the warning period' and provides specific commands for applying maintenance exclusions

assertions.expectation: Auto-upgrade scheduled notifications should trigger pre-upgrade checklist execution
assertions.reason: Response mentions evaluating scheduled upgrades against release calendar and coordination needs but does not specifically mention executing a pre-upgrade checklist

assertions.expectation: Security patch notifications may require expedited upgrades outside normal maintenance windows
assertions.reason: Response categorizes security patches as URGENT requiring review within SLA requirements and mentions 'Fast-track through staging first' for production clusters

assertions.expectation: New version available notifications are informational — use for planning, not immediate action
assertions.reason: Response categorizes 'version available' notifications as MEDIUM priority with action to 'Review release notes, plan testing if considering early adoption' and notes they are for planning purposes

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting up Pub/Sub or Cloud Monitoring alerts for GKE upgrade events
assertions.reason: Response provides specific Cloud Monitoring alert policy YAML configuration for GKE EoS notifications and mentions 'log-based alerting for urgent notifications'

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE release notes as the source for understanding what changed in each version
assertions.reason: Response explicitly mentions 'Review release notes' multiple times as action items for version available notifications and upgrade planning
